creator: ava.mia.in@gmail.com
text:
The issue you're encountering with the FreeBSD-12.0-RELEASE-amd64-disc1.iso being too big for a standard 700MB CDROM suggests that you may need a larger capacity storage medium, such as a DVD or a USB flash drive, to accommodate the size of the ISO file.

Regarding "N3K-C3172PQ-XL | Cisco | Nexus Network Switch," it seems like you're mentioning a specific Cisco Nexus Network Switch model. If you have any questions or need information about this Cisco switch, feel free to ask, and I'll do my best to provide relevant details
https://www.serverblink.com/n3k-c3172pq-xl-cisco-nexus-network-switch/
